name: agent-os
description: Private workspace recovery, software design, and delivery workflows for durable cross-device development.

interface.shortDescription: Design and deliver private software tasks safely.
interface.longDescription: Recover evidence-based workspace readiness from durable remote state, use private tasks as delivery entry points, design clear domains, modules, data, and APIs from repository-owned facts, implement through GitHub without leaking private metadata, and write merged delivery evidence back privately.
defaultPrompt: Complete this private Linear issue through its linked GitHub repository.
Resume this private task from its latest GitHub checkpoint.
Assess this fresh development workspace and identify its safe recovery entry point.
Design this software change before implementation using repository-owned project facts.
